Package org.eventb.core.tests.pm

Class AbstractProofTests

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.core.tests.BuilderTest
org.eventb.core.tests.pm.AbstractProofTests
Direct Known Subclasses:
ProofAttemptTests, ProofComponentTests, ProofManagerTests
public abstract class AbstractProofTests extends BuilderTest
Common stuff for writing unit tests for Proof Components.
